displayTitle: The High Republic: Trail of Shadows #5
synopsis:
The fifth and final issue of the Marvel comic book miniseries Star Wars: The High Republic: Trail of Shadows.
It all comes crashing together in this finale as Emerick and Sian come face to face with mystery they've been hunting.
Who will survive?
Phase one of Star Wars: The High Republic culminates in this crashing conclusion.
title: The High Republic: Trail of Shadows #5
